etymology.description: Depicts a weapon: Y-shaped stick with stones on top -> middle point (rope or additional stone) -> stylized as horizontal line -> resembling 中 (middle) -> later as 田 (field) with added horizontal stroke at bottom
etymology.interpretation: Originally depicted a weapon or tool, resonating with the idea of singularity or usage as a individual instrument; the transformation into a character signifying 'single' or 'alone' relates to the singular nature of the weapon's depiction.
etymology.simplification: 單 simplified to 单 by removing the complex top component 吅 and retaining only the simplified character form.

examples.chinese: 我喜欢单独旅行(我喜歡單獨旅行)。
他只点了一道单菜(他只點了一道單菜)。
examples.pinyin: Tā zhǐ diǎnle yī dào dān cài.
examples.english: He only ordered a single dish.

examples.chinese: 这封信需要单独邮寄(這封信需要單獨郵寄)。
examples.pinyin: Zhè fēng xìn xūyào dāndú yóujì.
examples.english: This letter needs to be mailed separately.
